user.title: Set up Ostrom
user.description: Enter your API credentials from the [Ostrom Developer Portal]({portal_url}).

data_description.client_id: Your OAuth2 Client ID from the Ostrom Developer Portal.
data_description.client_secret: Your OAuth2 Client Secret from the Ostrom Developer Portal.
data_description.zip_code: Your postal code, used to fetch regional grid fees.
data_description.arbeitspreis: Your static contracted working price in ct/kWh (shown as a fixed sensor).

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your Client ID and Client Secret.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Ostrom API. Please try again.
